name: Innistrad: Midnight Hunt

draft.notes: 10 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 basic land, 1 ad card, 1 placeholder card. The last common is always double-faced (never replaced by a foil). There is either one double-faced uncommon or the rare is double-faced. If a foil appears it displaces a common and appears after the basic land. Two variations of each basic land. Composition includes 10 DFC commons, 23 DFC uncommons, 11 DFC rares, 5 DFC mythics.

statedRates: Foils in ~33% of boosters. Rare double-faced ~27/148 of the time.
sourceNotes: Large set of the era. Printed US, Belgium, Japan. 36 packs per box. Separate ad card AND double-faced placeholder card both present.
